<!-- gen-readme start - generated by https://github.com/jetify-com/devbox/ -->

## Getting Started

This project uses [devbox](https://github.com/jetify-com/devbox) to manage its
development environment.

Install devbox:

```sh
curl -fsSL https://get.jetpack.io/devbox | bash
```

Start the devbox shell:

```sh
devbox shell
```

Run a script in the devbox environment:

```sh
devbox run <script>
```

## Scripts

Scripts are custom commands that can be run using this project's environment.
This project has the following scripts:

- [devbox-update](#devbox-run-devbox-update)
- [devbox-upgrade](#devbox-run-devbox-upgrade)
- [docs-build](#devbox-run-docs-build)
- [docs-format](#devbox-run-docs-format)
- [docs-lint](#devbox-run-docs-lint)
- [docs-serve](#devbox-run-docs-serve)
- [help](#devbox-run-help)
- [reuse](#devbox-run-reuse)
- [test](#devbox-run-test)
- [uv-lock](#devbox-run-uv-lock)
- [uv-sync](#devbox-run-uv-sync)
- [uv-venv](#devbox-run-uv-venv)

## Environment

```sh
DEVBOX_COREPACK_ENABLED="0"
LC_ALL="C.UTF-8"
OPENSPEC_TELEMETRY="0"
PATH="${PWD}/.venv/bin:${PWD}/node_modules/.bin:${PWD}/scripts:${PATH}"
```

## Shell Init Hook

The Shell Init Hook is a script that runs whenever the devbox environment is
instantiated. It runs on `devbox shell` and on `devbox run`.

```sh
echo '1️⃣  INITIATE UV INSTALLATION... 🪄' && make uv-venv
echo '2️⃣  DOWNLOAD UV DEPENDENCIES... 🪄' && make uv-sync
echo '👋 WELCOME TO COMMITIZEN-SPDX-CHANGELOG! 👷'
```

- [glow@2](https://www.nixhub.io/packages/glow)

- [openspec@1](https://www.nixhub.io/packages/openspec)

- [python@3.14](https://www.nixhub.io/packages/python)
- [ripgrep@15](https://www.nixhub.io/packages/ripgrep)
- [shellcheck@0](https://www.nixhub.io/packages/shellcheck)
- [shfmt@3](https://www.nixhub.io/packages/shfmt)
- [uv@0](https://www.nixhub.io/packages/uv)
